name: Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp.
description: Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. operates as the bank holding company for Metropolitan Commercial Bank, providing a comprehensive range of business, commercial, and retail banking products and services. Headquartered in New York, the institution focuses on a relationship-based approach, offering specialized financial solutions for law firms, residential healthcare facilities, property management, and government entities. With over 25 years of experience, the bank is dedicated to helping clients grow their businesses and build generational wealth through innovative, solutions-oriented banking strategies, while maintaining a strong commitment to community development and excellence in execution.
